report.summary: F&G CRASHED 29 → 9 (Extreme Fear) — BTC ~$66,900 (-0.3% from v13). Since v13: 3 agents ran — EOD-v7 recounted 141 TS errors (4 files incl. new learn pages), Publish confirmed queue nearly empty (2 blocked pages), Design created 2 OG images + UX fixes on 4 pages. Published pages steady at 729. Production still FROZEN at e3f63fc — 46th escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v13 → v14: 3 agents ran since last standup — EOD-v7 (14:55), Publish (15:16), Design (15:35). No build or community cycle this window.

CRITICAL SENTIMENT SHIFT: F&G crashed from 29 (Fear) → 9 (Extreme Fear). This is the lowest sustained trough since Terra-Luna collapse (Jun 2022, bottomed at 6). Historically, sub-10 readings precede major accumulation phases within 30-90 days.
BTC: ~$66,900 (-0.3% from v13's $67,120). 24h volume ~$19-24B. Market cap ~$2.38T. BTC dominance still elevated — flight to quality continues.

DESIGN (15:35): Audited 4 learn pages — Abstract Chain, Initia, dYdX, Post-Quantum. Created 2 OG images (Abstract Chain ZK rollup, Initia Interwoven Rollups). Fixed OG metadata on 4 pages. Added BackToTop component to dYdX, mobile overflow wrappers to Abstract Chain.

PUBLISH (15:16): Queue effectively EMPTY — only 2 pages remain (monad-guide, zora-attention-markets-guide-2026), both blocked on missing page.tsx scaffolding. 729 published pages confirmed. Build passes on Vercel (ignoreBuildErrors).

EOD-v7 (14:55): Full recount — 141 TS errors across 4 files (lido-v3 94, structured-data 40, crypto-arbitrage 4, rwa-yield 3). Non-blocking but higher than v13's 25 count (v13 only counted structured-data file). defi-yields API still needs in-memory cache.

MACRO: Stablecoin supply $316B ATH. CLARITY Act roundtable Apr 16 (12 days). April token unlocks >$600M. Extreme fear = elevated search demand for 'buy the dip', 'DCA', 'crypto crash', 'is crypto dead'.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data confirmed via web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: 3 agents since v13. Design delivered 2 OG images + UX polish on 4 pages. Publish confirmed queue near-empty. EOD-v7 ran full audit — no regressions.
TODAY'S TOTAL (from report files): 28 agent runs (standup×10, eod×7, publish×7, community×3, design×1). Some earlier cycles may not have persisted individual reports.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 729 (stable since publish cycle — no new promotions, queue blocked). Up from 724 at v12.
QUEUE STATUS: Only 2 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE, both blocked on scaffolding. The queue is effectively exhausted — next priority shifts to building new pages or scaffolding the 2 remaining.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (46th ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. 530+ built pages sitting unpublished. F&G crashing to 9 makes deploy even more urgent — extreme fear queries are spiking. Deploy cost: $0. Deploy ROI: compounds daily.

P1 — TS ERRORS: EOD-v7 full recount shows 141 errors in 4 files (not just 25 in 1 file as v13 reported). lido-v3-stvaults-guide alone has 94. Non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors but represents real tech debt.
P2 — SCAFFOLD 2 REMAINING QUEUE PAGES: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets-guide-2026 need page.tsx to unblock the queue entirely.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All other work accumulates in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 46th ESCALATION): F&G at 9 = extreme fear = peak search demand for crisis content (DCA calculators, passive income guides, 'is crypto dead' articles). 530+ pages invisible to Google during the highest-intent search moment of 2026. Every hour without deploy = irreversible lost indexing time. This is now a strategic emergency, not just an operational one.

PRIORITY 2 — SCAFFOLD MONAD + ZORA PAGES: Queue is exhausted. Only 2 pages left, both blocked on scaffolding. Quick build cycle to create page.tsx for monad-guide and zora-attention-markets-guide-2026 would clear the queue to zero and signal pipeline completion.

PRIORITY 3 — TS ERROR CLEANUP: 141 errors in 4 files. The lido-v3-stvaults-guide page alone has 94 errors — likely a type-heavy component that needs interface fixes. Clearing this improves build health and makes ignoreBuildErrors removable long-term.
